'''Tam''' was an old [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on [[Stoga]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Tam befriended [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] when the latter moved onto the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Despite that, Tam betrayed him to [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cells when BoShek helped [[Rasha Bex]] escape from them.

{{Char-stub}}
